content:
喚醒體著新裝，「銀樞幻衣」商店上線！我們計劃在未來為大家帶來全新的喚醒體外觀設計——幻衣，包含但不限於：立繪、模組、動作、特效、配音等！

本次先帶來4位喚醒體的「簡約幻衣×贈送頭像」見面禮，可透過遊戲內活動與社群活動 免費獲得！

⭐**活動時間：**5 月 26 日 9:00 - 6 月 9 日 9:00

⭐**獲取方式：**
🔹【方式一】活動期間僅能用「簡約幻衣繪型券(一期)」免費兌換，最多可獲得5張。
①7天登錄活動：累計登錄7天，可獲1張
②週年活動「窺覷神國的陰影」：參與活動並累計擊退異動海潮30次，可獲1張
③社群獲取：5.26社區兌換碼，可獲1張
④端內郵件：5.30通過端內郵件，可獲1張
⑤必得召喚活動：活動期間首次進行活動喚醒「未被忘卻的」，可獲1張
🔹【方式二】活動結束後可用源液購買，「簡約幻衣×贈送頭像」售680源液。

⭐**特別說明：**
①所有幻衣都不會帶來任何戰鬥能力加成。
②簡約幻衣：通常僅為小部分服裝元素、姿勢動作等立繪上的調整，不含模組、動作、特效等變動。
③「簡約幻衣繪型券(一期)」使用期限：5 月 26 日 9:00 - 6 月 9 日 9:00，別忘了及時兌換

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

The Awakener Skins Shop has arrived! Alongside the Basic Skins released this time, we’ll also introduce brand-new Awakener Skins in the future, featuring:
New splash arts, Updated models & animations，Enhanced SFX effects，Exclusive voicelines，And more!

This time, you can get 4 sets of [Basic Skin & Free Avatar] for free through limited-time events and community activities!

⭐**Event Period: **May 26th, 9:00 – June 9th, 9:00 (UTC+8)

⭐**How to Obtain Skins:**
🔹[Method 1] During the event, you can only use the "Limited-Time simple skin (phase 1) Vouchers" for free redemption(Up to 5 Vouchers available)
①7-Day Login Bonus – Log in for 7 days total to receive 1 voucher.
②Anniversary Event: "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum" – Repel 30 Bleak Tides to earn 1 Limited-Time Voucher.
③Game Mail: May 30th in-game email, to earn 1 voucher
④Community Event –May 26 Community Redemption Code to earn 1 voucher
⑤Guaranteed Awakening Event – Perform your first 5× Awakening in "The Unforgotten" to earn 1 voucher.

🔹[Method 2] After the event ends, Purchase [Basic Skin & Free Avatar] with 680 Silver Prime

⭐**Special instructions:**
①No skin will bring any combat ability bonus.
② Basic Skin: Usually only a small part of the clothing elements, postures and actions are adjusted, and does not include changes to modules, actions, special effects, etc.
③ "Limited-time exchange voucher" validity period: May 26 9:00 - June 9 9:00, don't forget to exchange it in time
thread_title: 🎊銀樞幻衣：4套簡約幻衣限時免費領取┊Awakener Skins: 4 Basic Skins Free for Limited Time Only!
